label: Police / Fire
description: Romeo / Macomb County public safety monitoring starter presets. Macomb County primary public safety uses MPSCS P25 Phase II trunking; SDR++ analog NFM can tune/control channels but will not decode trunked voice by itself.

presets.label: MPSCS Romeo Ctrl 774.80625
presets.note: P25 trunking control channel; requires OP25/DSD-FME or similar

presets.label: MPSCS Romeo Alt 773.55625
presets.note: P25 trunking alternate control channel; requires OP25/DSD-FME or similar

presets.label: MPSCS Macomb Ctrl 853.9875
presets.note: P25 trunking control channel; requires OP25/DSD-FME or similar

presets.label: MPSCS Macomb Alt 852.9875
presets.note: P25 trunking alternate control channel; requires OP25/DSD-FME or similar
